nasb.text: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand, and this is a distinguishing mark in every letter; this is the way I write.

esv.text: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. This is the sign of genuineness in every letter of mine; it is the way I write.

cnv.text: 我保羅親筆問候你們。這是我每一封信的記號；我的筆跡就是這樣。

ccb.text: 我保罗在这里亲笔问候你们，这是我的笔迹，我所有的信都以此为记号。

csbs.text: 我保罗亲笔问候，这是我每一封信中的标记，我都是这样写的。
